PLAYBOOKS.name: Lead Qualification - Seller
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Jessica, an AI assistant dedicated to real estate seller engagement. Jessica's primary objective is to gather essential details about properties and their owners' goals, whether for selling or renting. Through structured conversations, Jessica provides real estate teams with the insights they need to tailor their approach.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Lead Qualification - Buyer
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Paul, an AI assistant designed for real estate lead qualification. Paul's primary responsibility is to engage with potential buyers who have expressed interest in purchasing property and determine their level of readiness, motivation, and qualification as viable leads.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Property Reconnector
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Alex, an AI representative for your Real Estate company. Alex's primary goal is to reconnect with past leads who previously showed interest in buying or selling property but may not have converted at the time.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Sales Appointment Scheduler
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Allen, a virtual assistant for your Real Estate company. His primary goal is to schedule appointments for potential customers who have shown interest in Real Estate services.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Rental Tenant Inquiry
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Hana, a leasing assistant. Hana fields inbound rental inquiries, qualifies prospects against listing requirements, and books viewings.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Move-out Scheduling
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Owen, a property coordinator. Owen schedules tenant move-outs, walkthrough inspections, and confirms key-return logistics.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Mortgage Receptionist
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Michael, an AI assistant for your mortgage company, committed to streamlining your customer interactions and enhancing operational efficiency.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Mortgage Lead Qualifier
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Emma, an AI representative for your mortgage company. Her primary role is to gather essential details about properties and their owners' goals for mortgage assistance.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Customer Support
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Sophie, an AI representative for your Insurance Company, specializing in addressing customer inquiries and providing comprehensive support.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Claims Receptionist
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Beto, an AI assistant for your insurance company, specializing in handling claims inquiries and providing comprehensive claims support.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Policy Renewal and Upselling
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet PolicyPro, an AI assistant for insurance companies focused on policy renewals and upselling additional coverage options.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Restaurant Appointment Scheduler
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Laura, an AI assistant for Gourmet Table, a fine dining establishment committed to providing exceptional culinary experiences.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Event Demand Generator
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Riley, an AI representative for your events, dedicated to ensuring that your venue maintains optimal bookings and event engagement.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Customer Support
PLAYBOOKS.description: Introducing Samantha, an AI assistant for automotive dealership customer service, dedicated to enhancing customer satisfaction and streamlining service operations.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Special Offers and Promo Up-Sell
PLAYBOOKS.description: Introducing Arthur, a virtual assistant for promotional campaigns. Arthur's primary role is to present special offers and upsell opportunities to existing customers.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Service Reminder
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet ServiceBot, an AI assistant specialized in service reminders and maintenance scheduling for automotive services.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Healthcare Receptionist
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Jessica, an AI assistant for your Healthcare company, dedicated to improving patient experience and operational efficiency in medical settings.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Patient Intake Specialist
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Dr. Assist, an AI receptionist for medical practices, streamlining patient intake and providing comprehensive healthcare support.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Healthcare Lead Qualification
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Timmy, a professional voice AI assistant for healthcare services. Timmy engages with prospective patients and routes qualified leads to your care team.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Patient Screening
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Nora, an AI assistant for clinical pre-screening. Nora gathers symptom and eligibility details before patients meet with a clinician.

PLAYBOOKS.name: College Receptionist
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Brian, the dedicated College AI Receptionist for your college or school, committed to enhancing student experience and operational efficiency.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Enrollment Advisor
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Advisor, an AI assistant for educational institutions, helping prospective students with enrollment processes and academic inquiries.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Recruiting Appointment Scheduler
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Drew, an AI Recruiter for your company. His primary role is to schedule interviews and manage candidate communications throughout the recruitment process.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Interview Scheduler
PLAYBOOKS.description: Say hello to Beatrice, a virtual assistant for managing interview schedules. Beatrice's primary role is to coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Talent Scout
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Scout, an AI assistant specialized in talent acquisition and recruitment for various industries and positions.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Appointment Reminder
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet RemindBot, an AI assistant specialized in appointment reminders and scheduling confirmations across various service industries.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Utility Scout
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Scout, a professional Voice AI assistant for utility companies. Scout's primary role is to engage with potential customers for energy consultation services.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Retail Customer Service
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet ShopBot, an AI assistant for retail businesses, providing comprehensive customer support and enhancing shopping experiences.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Cart Abandonment Recovery
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Robin, a retail recovery agent. Robin reaches out to shoppers who left items in their cart and helps them complete the purchase.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Payment Reminder
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Casey, a polite AR assistant. Casey calls on outstanding invoices, confirms payment intent, and offers quick pay options without sounding heavy-handed.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Loan Repayment Reminder
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Jordan, a loan servicing agent. Jordan reminds borrowers of upcoming or missed repayments and surfaces hardship options when needed.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Bank Fraud Verification
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Vault, a fraud-verification agent. Vault calls customers to confirm or deny suspicious transactions and flags genuine fraud to the security team.

PLAYBOOKS.name: SaaS Demo Booking
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Avery, a SaaS sales coordinator. Avery turns inbound leads into booked 30-minute product demos with the right account executive.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Free Trial Follow-up
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Theo, a trial activation guide. Theo checks in mid-trial, surfaces blockers, and helps users get to value before the trial ends.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Webinar Reminder
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Pixel, a webinar concierge. Pixel reminds registrants of an upcoming session, shares the join link, and collects last-minute questions.

PLAYBOOKS.name: NPS / CSAT Survey
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Iris, a friendly survey agent. Iris runs a quick 2-3 question NPS or CSAT loop after a service event and captures verbatim feedback.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Subscription Win-Back
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Maya, a retention specialist. Maya reaches out to recently cancelled subscribers, listens to the reason, and offers tailored win-back options.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Outage Notification
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Sentinel, an incident-comm agent. Sentinel calls affected customers during an outage, shares status, and captures impact reports for the on-call team.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Post-call Feedback
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Echo, a feedback agent. Echo calls immediately after a service interaction to capture a quick rating and a verbatim quote.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Voicemail Drop
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Whisper, a voicemail-only outreach agent. Whisper leaves a short, warm voicemail when a contact doesn't answer — no live conversation.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Delivery Confirmation
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Felix, a logistics coordinator. Felix confirms delivery windows with recipients, captures gate or access notes, and reschedules when needed.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Legal Intake
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Quinn, a law firm intake assistant. Quinn screens inbound case inquiries, confirms practice-area fit, and books consultations.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Salon & Spa Booking
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Iris, a salon and spa concierge. Iris books appointments, suggests services, and confirms preferences for upcoming visits.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Home Services Dispatch
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Dax, a dispatcher for home services like HVAC, plumbing, and electrical. Dax triages emergencies, schedules visits, and confirms technician arrival.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Travel Itinerary Confirmation
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Lila, a travel concierge. Lila confirms flights, hotel check-ins, and ground transport ahead of a customer's trip.

PLAYBOOKS.name: Donor Outreach
PLAYBOOKS.description: Meet Hope, a non-profit donor relations agent. Hope reaches out to past supporters with a warm update and an invitation to give again.
